fields.description:
## Why
Sharper detection content in criteria that already exist -- pure prompt work; findings get sharper, generic passes untouched.

## What (each edits an existing reviewers/plan_review_*.md)
- E6: verify-command defect taxonomy -- ENUMERATE all nine patterns (the report lists them) + corrected-command anchors (word-boundary/quoted-key grep; jq -e cardinality; assert on structured artifact not prose; prerequisite ordering).
- T3 (T3-LOCAL): three empiricism axes + a four-class evidence scale Verified/Partial/Unverified/Contradicted, each class DEFINED, recorded in Pass-1 evidence[] only. Fallback rule: when the surface cannot be probed (--help unavailable / endpoint unreachable), the class is Unverified. Confirm P1Finding.evidence is list[str] and sidecar carries it. Pass 2/4 rubric files unchanged.
- G3 (three-part coverage standard) + DEFINE bypass-annotation / scope-narrowing / partial-without-remainder.
- T5c: ambiguity-not-absence access framing. T11: post-rollback SCHEMA-STATE assertion + DATA LOSS RISK. E2: defaultable-gaps coaching. G4: consumer-enumeration precursor (recall->worklist over the existing consumer-impact mode).

## Provenance
Labels like G-8 / FP-3a / R-6 / WS-N are provenance tags from the DSO gap-report evaluation (~/dso_rebar_plan_review_gap_report.md) + session log brief-bride-rash (95f1-1b3b-a867-4020) -- they are NOT codebase symbols and cannot be grepped. Concrete code targets are named inline and in this ticket's file_impact.

Note: the T9 RETIRE-row rule was REJECTED in evaluation (a nit) -- it is intentionally NOT a deliverable here (kept out of the AC list to avoid an orphan criterion).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Each named rubric file updated as above; the nine E6 patterns and the four T3 classes are each explicitly enumerated/defined in-prompt.
- [ ] T3 change is Pass-1-only. Proof: `git diff --name-only` touches no plan_review_verifier*.md and no passes.py Pass-2/4 code.
- [ ] CI prompt/routing parity green. Proof: `python -m rebar.llm.plan_review.registry validate-routing` exits 0.
- [ ] Affected recall evals updated. Proof: `pytest tests/unit/test_plan_review_evals.py` green (incl. R-E6-cutover-no-live-ac).
